top_signals.title: Trump’s Freedom 250 draws corporate sponsors with business before his administration
top_signals.summary: Companies with federal interests — including Boeing, Lockheed Martin and Oracle — are sponsoring a Trump-aligned effort celebrating America’s 250th birthday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Ford achieves quality milestone, as CEO targets flawless new vehicle launches
top_signals.summary: Ford CEO Jim Farley told CNBC that the automaker has learned from its past quality and recall issues, which have hurt its earnings and stained its reputation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
